case_title: CREDITORS ADJUSTMENT BUREAU, INC. VS. ZARA EXPRESS LLC ET AL

docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE: PROOF OF SERVICE (TRANSACTION ID # 100143782) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CREDITORS ADJUSTMENT BUREAU, INC.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 66368414) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CREDITORS ADJUSTMENT BUREAU, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT ZARA EXPRESS LLC DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE NO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET NOT FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  AUG-23-2021

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 100138564), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF CREDITORS ADJUSTMENT BUREAU, INC. SERVED APR-17-2021, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON, MAILING DATE APR-18-2021 AS TO DEFENDANT ZARA EXPRESS LLC

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, COURT JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $797.72 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 100138564) AS TO DEFENDANT ZARA EXPRESS LLC

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CREDITORS ADJUSTMENT BUREAU, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ZARA EXPRESS LLC $10,849.56 PRINCIPAL, $1,425.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $1,490.94 INTEREST, $797.72 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $14,563.22, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 100138564)
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR OCT-05-2021 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
SUMMONS ISSUED (TRANSACTION ID # 66368414) TO PLAINTIFF CREDITORS ADJUSTMENT BUREAU, INC.
REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, E-FILING REJECT, (TRANSACTION ID # 100133160) SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF CREDITORS ADJUSTMENT BUREAU, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT ZARA EXPRESS LLC
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 100138564) AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE
ORDER STRIKING REQUEST OF CLERK JUDGMENT ON AUGUST 9, 2021 SHALL BE STRICKEN DUE TO ERROR.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CREDITORS ADJUSTMENT BUREAU, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ZARA EXPRESS LLC $10,849.56 PRINCIPAL, $1,425.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $1,490.94 INTEREST, $797.72 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $14,563.22, SEE SCANNED DOC
CIVIL CASE COVERSHEET FILED (TRANSACTION ID # 66368414) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CREDITORS ADJUSTMENT BUREAU, INC.
NOTICE OF ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE: PROOF OF SERVICE (TRANSACTION ID # 100141452) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CREDITORS ADJUSTMENT BUREAU, INC.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR OCT-05-2021 CONTINUED TO MAR-15-2022 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO ENTER DEFAULT JUDGMENT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF MAR-15-2022 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
